title: Senior Fleet Manager at SFC Group

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at SFC Group
jsonLd.description:
SFC Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SFC Group:
SFC Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SFC Group!
